tickets.title: US001: Course prerequisite checking
tickets.description:
As a student, I want the system to automatically check course prerequisites so that I can know whether I am eligible to enroll in a course.

Acceptance Criteria:
1. The system displays a warning when prerequisites are not completed.
2. The system allows a course to be added when all prerequisites are completed.
3. The system displays all prerequisite courses in the course details.
